Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorPatientIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorPatientIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorPatientIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorPatientIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practicePatientA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
pat-1errorPatient.contactSHALL at least contain a contact's details or a reference to an organization
: name.exists() or telecom.exists() or address.exists() or organization.exists()

This structure is derived from Patient

Summary

Mandatory: 23 elements (4 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 26 elements
Prohibited: 4 elements

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/CodigoPaises
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/IdentidadGenero
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/PertenecienteEtnia
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Etnia
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Etniatexto
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Afrodescendiente
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-mothers-family
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-fathers-family

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Patient.identifier is sliced based on the value of value:use
  • The element Patient.name is sliced based on the value of value:use
  • The element Patient.telecom is sliced based on the value of value:use

Differential View

This structure is derived from Patient

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorPatientIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorPatientIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorPatientIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorPatientIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practicePatientA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

name 0..1HumanNameA name associated with the contact person

address 0..1AddressAddress for the contact person
gender 0..1codemale | female | other | unknown

extension 0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
pat-1errorPatient.contactSHALL at least contain a contact's details or a reference to an organization
: name.exists() or telecom.exists() or address.exists() or organization.exists()

This structure is derived from Patient

Summary

Mandatory: 23 elements (4 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 26 elements
Prohibited: 4 elements

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/CodigoPaises
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/IdentidadGenero
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/PertenecienteEtnia
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Etnia
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Etniatexto
  • http://minsal.cl/listaespera/StructureDefinition/Afrodescendiente
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-mothers-family
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-fathers-family

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Patient.identifier is sliced based on the value of value:use
  • The element Patient.name is sliced based on the value of value:use
  • The element Patient.telecom is sliced based on the value of value:use
